framing: Audit manager at Big Four seeking move to fintech internal audit lead

jd.title: Head of Internal Audit

requirements.text: 8+ years of audit experience, with at least 3 years in financial services or fintech
Qualified accountant (ACA, ACCA, or equivalent) or CIA certification
Experience auditing technology environments including cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP), CI/CD pipelines, and SOC 2 controls
Knowledge of PSD2, EMD2, and EU/EEA banking supervision requirements
Experience with audit management software (TeamMate+, AuditBoard, or Diligent HighBond)
Experience building internal audit functions from scratch or significantly scaling existing teams
Data analytics skills using ACL Analytics, IDEA, or Python for audit sampling and continuous monitoring
Experience with BNPL (Buy Now Pay Later) or consumer lending risk frameworks
Fluency in English; Swedish is a plus

responsibilities: Build and lead internal audit function reporting directly to Audit Committee and Board
Develop risk-based annual audit plan covering financial, operational, IT, and regulatory risks
Execute audits of credit risk models, AML/KYC processes, and technology infrastructure
Coordinate with external auditors (Deloitte) and Swedish Financial Supervisory Authority (Finansinspektionen)
Implement continuous auditing and monitoring using data analytics tools
Report findings and remediation tracking to Audit Committee quarterly

expected_output.summary: Audit professional with 9 years of experience at KPMG London, most recently Audit Manager in the Financial Services practice specialising in banking and fintech clients. Led audits of 6 FCA-regulated fintech firms including e-money institutions and payment service providers. ACA qualified with CISA certification. Experience with SOC 2 attestation, PSD2 compliance auditing, and technology risk assessment. Seeking transition to in-house Head of Internal Audit at a scaling fintech.

experience.title: Audit Manager — Financial Services
bullets: Led external audit engagements for 6 FCA-regulated fintech clients (e-money institutions, payment service providers, challenger banks)
Managed audit teams of 4-8 across planning, fieldwork, and completion phases for clients with revenues up to GBP 500M
Performed SOC 2 Type II attestation engagements for 3 cloud-native fintech platforms (AWS-hosted)
Assessed PSD2 safeguarding compliance and FCA EMR/PSR safeguarding requirements for e-money and payment institution clients across 4 audit cycles
Developed KPMG's fintech audit methodology for e-money and payment institution engagements

experience.title: Assistant Manager / Audit Senior (promoted from Associate 2018, to Assistant Manager 2020)
bullets: Progressed from graduate associate through audit senior to assistant manager on banking and insurance engagements
Performed IT general controls testing (ITGC) across core banking platforms (Temenos Transact (formerly T24), Finastra)
Supported 2 AML/KYC compliance audits for mid-tier UK banks
Achieved ACA qualification (ICAEW) in 2019, CISA certification in 2020

certifications: ACA — Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICAEW, 2019)
education: BSc Accounting & Finance — University of Warwick (2013-2016)

jd_requirements: technology audit cloud AWS GCP CI/CD SOC 2
PSD2 EMD2 EU EEA banking supervision
TeamMate+ AuditBoard Diligent HighBond audit management
building internal audit function scaling teams
ACL Analytics IDEA Python audit data analytics
deliberate_flaws: No internal audit experience — entire career in external audit (Big Four)
No experience building audit functions from scratch (only managed existing teams)
No CIA certification (has ACA + CISA but JD specifically mentions CIA)
No TeamMate+, AuditBoard, or Diligent HighBond experience (used KPMG proprietary tools)
No BNPL or consumer lending audit experience
Python skills are basic — JD wants data analytics for continuous monitoring
External audit culture (compliance-focused) vs internal audit (advisory/business partner) — mindset shift needed
